channel.title: Sports
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Sports, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Fanatics Sportsbook Promo: Get a 100% bet match up to $100 in FanCash for 10 days
item.description: Fanatics Sportsbook Promo: 10 x $100 Bet Matches In FanCash. New customers get a 100% bet match up to $100 in FanCash for 10 days.

item.title: FanDuel Promo Code: Get $250 in Bonus Bets If Your Bet Wins!
item.description: Bet $5, get $250 in Bonus Bets If Your Bet Wins with our FanDuel sportsbook offer for new users.

item.title: bet365 Bonus Code: Bet $10, Get $200 in Bonus Bets Win or Lose with Promo Code FOX365
item.description: Claim the bet365 Sportsbook promo code which give you $365 in bonus bets.

item.title: 2026 NFL Power Rankings: Which Teams Improved Most With the Draft?
item.description: Ralph Vacchiano updates the league's hierarchy following the NFL Draft.
